calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Continued To Jun-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Terry De Young, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

Ms. De Young at the outset reports that she has been working with the Examiner assigned to this matter to correct the issues with her papers and commends the Examiner for his continued consideration and assistance.

The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is continued to June 23, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
